sentences.arabic: يُمَثِّلُ الصِّدْقُ رَكِيزَةً أَسَاسِيَّةً فِي بِنَاءِ الْمُجْتَمَعِ الْإِسْلَامِيِّ، فَهُوَ يَهْدِي إِلَى كُلِّ خَيْرٍ وَيُبْعِدُ عَنِ النِّفَاقِ.
sentences.translation: Istinoljubivost predstavlja osnovni oslonac u izgradnji islamskog društva, jer ona vodi svakom dobru i udaljava od licemjerja.
sentences.translationEn: Truthfulness represents a fundamental pillar in building the Islamic society, for it leads to all good and keeps one away from hypocrisy.

sentences.arabic: وَرَدَ فِي الصَّحِيحَيْنِ قَوْلُهُ ﷺ: «عَلَيْكُمْ بِالصِّدْقِ، فَإِنَّ الصِّدْقَ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْبِرِّ، وَإِنَّ الْبِرَّ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْأَدَبِ، رَقْمُ ٦٠٩٤].
sentences.translation: U dva Sahiha se prenosi njegov, s.a.v.s., govor: 'Držite se istine, jer istina vodi ka dobročinstvu, a dobročinstvo vodi u Džennet' [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o adabu, br. 6094].
sentences.translationEn: It was reported in the two Sahihs that he (PBUH) said: 'You must be truthful, for truthfulness leads to righteousness, and righteousness leads to Paradise' [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of Manners, No. 6094].

sentences.arabic: يُؤَكِّدُ الْمُحَدِّثُ الْأَلْبَانِيُّ رَحِمَهُ اللهُ أَنَّ التَّحَلِّيَ بِهَذِهِ الصِّفَةِ يَجِبُ أَنْ يَكُونَ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فِي الْقَوْلِ وَالْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Muhadis el-Albani, rahimehullah, potvrđuje da kićenje ovom osobinom mora biti vidljivo i skriveno, u govoru i u djelu.
sentences.translationEn: The Hadith scholar al-Albani, may Allah have mercy on him, emphasizes that embodying this quality must be outward and inward, in word and deed.

sentences.arabic: فَالْمُؤْمِنُ لَا يَكْذِبُ أَبَدًا، لِأَنَّ الْكَذِبَ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْفُجُورِ الَّذِي يُؤَدِّي إِلَى النَّارِ.
sentences.translation: Vjernik nikada ne laže, jer laž vodi u griješenje koje vodi u Vatru.
sentences.translationEn: A believer never lies, because lying leads to wickedness, which leads to the Fire.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِالْتِزَامَ بِالصِّدْقِ يُورِثُ الثِّقَةَ بَيْنَ النَّاسِ وَيَجْلِبُ بَرَكَةَ اللهِ فِي الرِّزْقِ وَالْعُمْرِ.
sentences.translation: Pridržavanje istine rađa povjerenje među ljudima i donosi Allahov blagoslov (bereket) u opskrbi i životu.
sentences.translationEn: Commitment to truthfulness creates trust among people and brings Allah's blessing in sustenance and life.

sentences.arabic: وَمِنْ هُنَا، يَنْبَغِي تَرْبِيَةُ الْأَجْيَالِ عَلَى قَوْلِ الْحَقِّ مَهْمَا كَانَتِ الظُّرُوفُ.
sentences.translation: Otuda je neophodno odgajati generacije da govore istinu bez obzira na okolnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Hence, generations should be raised to speak the truth regardless of the circumstances.
